news.title: ‘The Augustana Senior Show’ at Eide/Dalrymple Gallery to Celebrate Eight Graduating Artists
news.summary_en: The Eide/Dalrymple Gallery at Augustana opens “Surface: The Augustana Senior Show,” which will be on view Thursday, April 30, through Saturday, May 23 — Augustana’s commencement. A gallery reception will take place on Friday, May 1, from 7-9 p.m., with awards and graduating artist talks at 7:30 p.m.
